title: Add Footer to Login and Passcode Pages
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the login and passcode pages to have a footer with copyright and support links, so that branding is consistent and help is accessible from every page.
description:
Add the standard application footer to the login and passcode pages. The footer should be anchored to the bottom of the page.

## Footer Content
- Left: `© 2023 Data Tools Pro. All rights reserved.`
- Right: Privacy Policy link → datatoolspro.com/support, Contact Us link → datatoolspro.com/contact/
acceptance_criteria: Footer appears on the login page anchored to the bottom
Footer appears on the passcode page anchored to the bottom
Footer content matches the main application footer
Privacy Policy and Contact Us links work correctly
ux_changes: Standard application footer with copyright and support links added to login and passcode pages, anchored to the bottom.
implementation_notes: Footer HTML placed below the closing content tag, position anchored to page bottom via CSS.
comment_summary: Developer added the footer to both login and beta passcode pages.
